sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, to see, to look at, i.q. שָׂכָה, שָׁעָה; as to the kindredship of the verbs לה֞ (which see), and לח֞ see under קָלַח p. 732, B .

Hiphil, to behold, to look at, followed by אֶל, any thing, Isa 14:16 followed by מִן from any place, Psa 33:14 but Son 2:9, מַשְׁגִּיחַ מִן הַחַלֹּונֹות is, (he is) looking in at the windows. (Chald. metaph. to provide, הַשְׁגָחָה providence.)
